prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **Honda B16A2 (1.6L DOHC VTEC, 160hp stock)** with a **Hasport Performance EG/B-series swap kit** for seamless integration, paired with a **Toda Racing B16A Type-R spec camshaft (272° duration, 11.5mm lift)** and **Toda Racing valve springs/retainers** to handle 9,000 RPM safely. Port and polish the cylinder head with **Ferrea Racing 5000 series valves (1mm oversized intake, 1mm oversized exhaust)** and a **Skunk2 Pro Series intake manifold** for optimized airflow.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R, 60 trim)** on a **Full-Race Motorsports B-series turbo manifold (T3 flange, equal-length runners)** with a **GReddy Type-S intercooler (55mm core, 2.5" piping)** and **Hondata S300 standalone ECU** tuned for 12 psi on **E85 fuel** (targeting 300whp). Supporting mods include a **Wiseco forged piston kit (8.5:1 compression, 81mm bore)** with **Eagle H-beam rods** and a **K-Tuned 75mm throttle body**.

Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear, 30-way damping adjustability)** paired with **Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (full set)** and **Spoon Sports rear trailing arm bushings** to eliminate compliance. Braking upgraded to **StopTech ST-40 4-piston calipers (12.6" rotors front, 11.8" rear)** with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines**. Chassis reinforcement via **Spoon Sports 4-point strut bar** and **Hasport rear subframe brace**.
estetica: Full **J's Racing CR-X Del Sol widebody conversion kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom side skirts, and rear bumper) with **Seibon carbon fiber hood (3.5mm thick, 50% weight reduction)** and **Veilside Fortune rear wing (2-tier, 1,200mm width)** for aggressive stance and downforce. Painted in **PPG Honda Championship White (NH-578) with House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red pearl flakes** for a JGTC-inspired finish.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved)** mounted on **Sparco Pro 2000 seat rails**, paired with a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede)** and **NRG quick-release hub**. Full **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses** and a **Spoon Sports carbon fiber shift knob** for the **Honda S2000 6-speed shifter (short-throw conversion)**. Custom **Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and door cards** with **Defi BF gauges (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR)** in a **Spoon Sports A-pillar pod**.

Lightweight aero and functional details: **Voltex Type-3 front splitter (carbon fiber, 3" overhang)** with **GP Moto carbon fiber side mirrors** and **Work Meister S1 3P wheels (15x8 +25 front, 15x9 +30 rear)** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (195/50/15 front, 225/45/15 rear)**. Engine bay showcases a **Spoon Sports carbon fiber radiator support** and **Mugen MF10 exhaust (4-2-1 header, 2.5" piping, titanium tips)** with **ASR heat wrap** for thermal management. Underglow via **Oracle Lighting RGB LED kits (diffused, 12V, waterproof)** for nighttime visibility.
